name: Ventas, Inc.
description: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) is a leading S&P 500 real estate investment trust (REIT) that specializes in owning and managing a diversified portfolio of healthcare and medical-residential facilities. The company is dedicated to enabling exceptional environments that benefit a large and growing aging population. With a focus on long-term value creation, Ventas invests in research, medicine, and healthcare properties across the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom, consistently aiming to deliver strong, sustainable shareholder returns through its strategic management of high-quality healthcare real estate assets.
